question: Describe the effects of fatigue that will affect a pilot during a UA operation.

options.text: The UA operator will be more focus on the task.
The UA operator will encounter more illusions while on a UAS operation.
Accidents may occur due to lack of focus causing loss of control of UA.
The UAS operator will risk crashing of UAS, losing control of UA, losing line of sight easily of the UAS, but recovering control in the end.
